race.comment: AUTUMN KING (2) sharp return with the 61.5kg when shedding his Maiden tag in emphatic style over 1000m at Muswellbrook in fast time. Placed at this trip last prep and maps to get the gun run. Hard to stop. INTO BROOKLYN (6) has returned in good order having placed in both runs since a spell. Won the maiden when third up at the first prep so could peak again. BONDASONG (1) has trialled well since the last-start miss. Nice Gosford winner over this distance on debut prior. Worth another chance. BONOYSTER (12) snagged back from the awkward gate and warmed up late with a respectable fifth over 1280m at Muswellbrook. Goes into the exotics.
